message:
🐛 fix(i18n): update kc-agent tooltip strings across all non-English locales (#8217) (#8227)

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

files.patch:
@@ -1446,10 +1446,10 @@
     "aiAgentOnDesc": "AI processing enabled",
     "aiPausedBanner": "AI is paused — select an agent to enable AI features",
     "backendUnavailable": "Backend API unavailable",
-    "localAgentConnected": "Local Agent connected",
-    "connecting": "Connecting to agent...",
+    "localAgentConnected": "kc-agent verbunden — verbindet Console mit deinem lokalen kubeconfig",
+    "connecting": "Verbinde mit kc-agent...",
     "offline": "Offline",
-    "localAgentDisconnected": "Local Agent disconnected",
+    "localAgentDisconnected": "kc-agent offline — starte ./startup-oauth.sh",
     "cluster": "Cluster",
     "inClusterModeTitle": "In-cluster mode - using ServiceAccount",
     "localAgentBypassed": "Local Agent: Bypassed",

-    "localAgentDisconnected": "Local Agent disconnected",

     "localAgentBypassed": "Local Agent: Bypassed",
